payload.answer: Command rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands. This action requires administrator privileges.
citations: Access control policy: admin commands restricted to admin role
Command /brain admin sql requires elevated authorization
User role: normal_user does not have admin capability

entity_resolution.reason: User lacks admin privileges required for /brain admin sql operations

payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Normal user attempted to execute /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards command

repair_options: Contact system administrator to request memory modification
Use standard /brain commands available to normal users
Request admin role elevation through proper authorization channels
